particulars.description: Ground and first floor of 247 oakleigh road north, london N20 0TX with title number to be allocated pending registration of a lease dated on or around the date of the instrument and made between (1) albert moussafir and (2) abjv limited LTD out of the parent title number NGL666136, as more particularly described in schedule 2 of the instrument.. The domain name “thevetwhetstone.co.UK” and unregistered trademarks, each as more particularly described in schedule 2 of the instrument.
